name: Oak Tree Dental
tagline: A husband-and-wife dental team dedicated to making Sebastopol smile
seoDescription: Oak Tree Dental in downtown Sebastopol: locally-owned family & cosmetic care from Drs. Grados & Shehadeh. CEREC same-day crowns, implants, Invisalign

sections.heading: Locally-owned family dentistry in downtown Sebastopol
sections.subheading: Drs. Anthony Grados and Karimeh Shehadeh provide patient-centered care that's never rushed — for the whole family, from children to seniors.

sections.heading: Comprehensive care for the whole family

items.title: Family & Preventive Dentistry
items.description: Routine exams, thorough cleanings and at-home care guidance for every age, from children to seniors — the foundation of a healthy smile.

items.title: CEREC Same-Day Crowns
items.description: Restore a damaged tooth in a single visit. With CEREC technology, your custom crown is designed, milled and placed the same day — no second appointment, no temporary.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.description: Permanent, natural-looking replacements for missing teeth that restore both function and confidence, planned and placed by Dr. Grados.

items.title: Invisalign Clear Aligners
items.description: A modern, discreet alternative to braces using custom clear trays to gently straighten teeth — a focus area for Dr. Shehadeh.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: From whitening to smile makeovers, a full range of cosmetic options to help you achieve the smile you've always wanted.

items.title: Emergency Dentistry
items.description: Same-day relief for dental emergencies — toothaches, broken or knocked-out teeth — so you're never left in pain.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Oak Tree Dental and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: About Oak Tree Dental
body: Oak Tree Dental is a locally-owned, family practice led by Drs. Anthony Grados and Karimeh Shehadeh, a husband-and-wife team dedicated to making Sebastopol smile. After Dr. Grados completed dental school at NYU and Dr. Shehadeh at the University of the Pacific, the two met during residency in Brooklyn and married a few years later. Drawn back to California, they fell in love with Sebastopol and purchased their practice here at 220 Petaluma Ave in the heart of downtown.

Their approach is simple: excellent, personalized care that's always patient-centered and never rushed. Dr. Grados graduated with honors in endodontics, while Dr. Shehadeh — who previously served as a dentist at Facebook — focuses on helping kids and anxious patients overcome their fears by building real trust. Together they care for families from across Sonoma County, including Sebastopol, Graton, Santa Rosa, Cotati, Forestville and beyond.
highlights: Husband-and-wife dentist team — Drs. Grados & Shehadeh

items.quote: I've been at Oak Tree Dental for two-and-a-half years now and my experience has continued to be stellar. Dr. Grados is incredibly skilled, knowledgeable, helpful and kind.
Dr. Grados and team are the MOST compassionate, caring staff I have come across. Not only was I completely supported, they took the time to explain everything I needed to know.
They are warm and kind people with a good sense of humor and easy to be around, especially for us nervous types.

items.title: Locally-Owned & 5-Star Rated
items.body: Rooted right here in Sebastopol, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

items.title: Rated 4.9 Stars (453+ Reviews)
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.
